name: AI-Powered Video Game Retrieval and Classification System
desc: Designed and implemented a computer vision retrieval system that identifies video games from gameplay clips using OpenCLIP embeddings. Engineered an end-to-end pipeline featuring frame sampling, semantic image retrieval, confidence scoring, temporal prediction aggregation, embedding caching, and explainable AI frame attribution.

name: Password Manager
desc: This app is a Secure, cross-platform, and locally hosted password manager.

name: Social App
desc: Social App Social App is a minimalistic social media platform built with Next.js. Share your thoughts with or without images, interact with others through likes and comments, and view posts globally or just your own in the dashboard.
